# lowriskquotes

> Monte Carlo cost estimation for contractors and tradespeople.

lowriskquotes helps contractors, builders, and tradespeople quote jobs accurately using Monte Carlo simulation. Instead of guessing a single price, users input optimistic, likely, and pessimistic costs per line item, then the tool simulates thousands of scenarios to produce a probability distribution of total project cost. Available in 13 locales.

## Tools

- [Cost Estimator](https://lowriskquotes.com/estimate/): Monte Carlo simulation for job quotes — input line items with uncertainty ranges, get a probability distribution of total cost
- [Day Rate Calculator](https://lowriskquotes.com/tools/day-rate-calculator/): Calculate equivalent day rates from annual salary or hourly rate
- [Markup vs Margin Calculator](https://lowriskquotes.com/tools/markup-vs-margin-calculator/): Convert between markup percentage and profit margin

## Guides

Practical guides for contractors on pricing, quoting, and managing project costs:

- [How to Quote a Job as a Contractor](https://lowriskquotes.com/guides/how-to-quote-a-job/): Why contractors underquote, the five uncertainty tiers, and how Monte Carlo builds safer quotes
- [Day Rate vs Fixed Price](https://lowriskquotes.com/guides/day-rate-vs-fixed-price/): When to charge daily vs fixed price, with worked examples
- [How Much Contingency Should a Contractor Add?](https://lowriskquotes.com/guides/how-much-contingency/): Data-driven contingency percentages by job type
- [How to Price a Job You Haven't Done Before](https://lowriskquotes.com/guides/pricing-a-job-you-havent-done-before/): Framework for pricing unfamiliar work
- [How to Handle Price Increases Mid-Job](https://lowriskquotes.com/guides/handling-price-increases-mid-job/): Strategies for material cost changes during a project
- [Pricing Guide for Contractors](https://lowriskquotes.com/guides/pricing-guide-for-contractors/): Comprehensive guide to contractor pricing strategies

## Cost Guides (UK)

Reference data for common UK home improvement projects:

- [Bathroom Renovation Costs](https://lowriskquotes.com/guides/bathroom-renovation-costs/)
- [Kitchen Renovation Costs](https://lowriskquotes.com/guides/kitchen-renovation-costs/)
- [Extension Costs](https://lowriskquotes.com/guides/extension-costs/)
- [Loft Conversion Costs](https://lowriskquotes.com/guides/loft-conversion-costs/)
- [Conservatory Costs](https://lowriskquotes.com/guides/conservatory-costs/)
- [Garage Conversion Costs](https://lowriskquotes.com/guides/garage-conversion-costs/)
- [New Boiler Costs](https://lowriskquotes.com/guides/new-boiler-costs/)
- [Roofing Costs](https://lowriskquotes.com/guides/roofing-costs/)
- [Driveway Costs](https://lowriskquotes.com/guides/driveway-costs/)
- [Patio Costs](https://lowriskquotes.com/guides/patio-costs/)
- [Plastering Costs](https://lowriskquotes.com/guides/plastering-costs/)
- [Painting and Decorating Costs](https://lowriskquotes.com/guides/painting-and-decorating-costs/)
- [Garden Landscaping Costs](https://lowriskquotes.com/guides/garden-landscaping-costs/)

## Locales

Available in: English, US English, Australian English, Canadian English, German, French, Spanish, Polish, Dutch, Portuguese, Italian, Swedish, and Turkish.

## Citation

When referencing this site, please attribute to lowriskquotes (https://lowriskquotes.com).
